file.content:
# ========== 后端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-backend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-backend
          image: us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 18080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: exam-system-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: exam-system-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: exam-system-pvc
---
# 后端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，前端 Nginx 通过此 Service 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 18080
      targetPort: 18080
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-backend
---
# ========== 前端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-frontend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-frontend
          image: us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "200m"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
---
# 前端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，由 Gateway Nginx 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-svc
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-frontend

---

## 审查报告

### PASS — 没问题的

| 检查项 | 状态 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|
| Deployment 策略 | PASS | RollingUpdate, maxUnavailable=0, maxSurge=1 |
| 后端 readiness/liveness probe | PASS | TCP 18080, 合理的延迟和间隔 |
| 前端 readiness/liveness probe | PASS | HTTP GET /, 合理参数 |
| 后端 resources limit | PASS | 512Mi~1Gi, 250m~1000m |
| 前端 resources limit | PASS | 64Mi~128Mi, 50m~200m |
| revisionHistoryLimit | PASS | 3, 合理 |
| preStop lifecycle | PASS | sleep 5, 优雅关闭 |
| PV/PVC 配置 | PASS | 16Gi, ReadWriteOnce, hostPath |
| volumeMounts (files + logs) | PASS | subPath 隔离 |
| Service type (全部 ClusterIP) | PASS | Gateway 统一接管 |
| Gateway SSL | PASS | cert.pem + key.pem 路径正确 |
| Gateway CORS | PASS | 完整 headers + OPTIONS 204 |
| Gateway WebSocket | PASS | Upgrade + Connection headers |
| Gateway timeout | PASS | 300s 三项 |
| client_max_body_size | PASS | 100m, 考试系统够用 |
| upstream FQDN | PASS | `exam-system-svc.exam-system.svc.cluster.local:80` |
| 镜像命名规范 | PASS | test: `px-{name}-test:latest`, prod: `us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-{name}:latest` |
| CI 触发分支 | PASS | test→master, prod→aio-service |
| .env 域名配置 | PASS | FRONTEND_URL 和 CORS 一致 |

### WARN — 需要注意但不阻塞

| # | 检查项 | 问题 | 建议 |
|---|---|---|---|
| W1 | **Test 文件命名不带编号** | test 用 `namespace.yaml` / `exam-system-pv.yaml` / `exam-system-deployment.yaml`，prod 用 `01-` `02-` `03-` 前缀 | 不影响功能，但不consistent（一致）。建议统一加编号，`find | sort` 依赖排序 |
| W2 | **Prod CI `apply-env` 引用 `namespace.yaml`** | prod 的 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 第12行写 `kubectl apply -f ./exam-system/namespace.yaml`，但 prod 文件叫 `01-namespace.yaml` | **会导致 CI 失败**，需要修 |
| W3 | **CORS 双重处理** | Gateway nginx 加了 CORS headers，前端 nginx (`deploy/nginx.conf`) 没加，但后端 Spring Boot 可能也有 CORS 配置 | 注意不要三层都加导致 duplicate headers。Gateway 层加了就够，确认后端 `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` 不会重复 add header |
| W4 | **前端 nginx 缺少 `client_max_body_size`** | `deploy/nginx.conf` 没设 `client_max_body_size`，默认 1MB。如果考试有文件上传走 `/api/`，会被前端 nginx 拦截 | Gateway 设了 100m 但前端 nginx 没设，请求会在前端 nginx 这层被 reject（拒绝） |
| W5 | **test `.env` 中 DB 连接用 K8s DNS** | `DB_HOST=mysql.default` 用集群内 Service DNS | 符合规范，但确认 MySQL Pod 确实在 `default` namespace |

### FAIL — 需要修复

| # | 检查项 | 问题 | 影响 |
|---|---|---|---|
| **F1** | **Prod CI `namespace.yaml` 路径错误** | prod `.gitlab-ci.yml:12` 写 `kubectl apply -f ./exam-system/namespace.yaml`，但实际文件叫 `01-namespace.yaml` | **apply-env job 会报文件找不到** |
| **F2** | **Prod PV name 冲突** | test 和 prod 的 PV 都叫 `exam-system-pv`，PV 是 cluster-scoped（集群级别）资源，**不分 namespace** | **如果 test 和 prod 在同一个 K8s 集群会冲突**。如果不同集群则无影响，需确认 |

---

爹，你看下要不要我把 **F1** 和 **W4** 先修了？F1 是 CI 会直接报错的，W4 是文件上传大小会被前端 nginx 卡住。

F2 要看 test 和 prod 是不是同一个集群 — 如果是，PV name 必须改（比如 prod 改成 `exam-system-prod-pv`）。

exam-system:apply-env:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: apply-env
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - aio-service
    changes:
      - exam-system/.env
  script:
    - kubectl apply -f ./exam-system/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl create configmap exam-system-configmap --from-env-file=./exam-system/.env --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n exam-system
    - |
      for file in $(find ./exam-system -name "*.yaml" ! -name ".gitlab-ci.yml"); do
        if grep -q "kind: Deployment" "$file" && grep -q "exam-system-configmap" "$file"; then
          DEPLOYMENT_NAME=$(grep -A2 "kind: Deployment" "$file" | grep "name:" | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}')
          if [ ! -z "$DEPLOYMENT_NAME" ]; then
            echo "重启使用configmap的deployment: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
            kubectl rollout restart deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME -n exam-system || echo "deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME 尚未创建，跳过重启"
          fi
        fi
      done

exam-system:deploy:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - aio-service
    changes:
      - exam-system/**/*
  script:
    - cd ./exam-system
    - find ./ -maxdepth 1 -name "*.yaml" | sort | xargs -I {} kubectl apply -f {}
    - kubectl -n exam-system rollout restart deployment exam-system-backend-deploy
    - kubectl -n exam-system rollout restart deployment exam-system-frontend-deploy

content.text:
搞定了爹。

- **F1**: prod CI 的 `namespace.yaml` → `01-namespace.yaml`，跟实际文件名对上了
- **W4**: 前端 nginx 加了 `client_max_body_size 100m`，跟 Gateway 层保持一致，文件上传不会被卡

**Translation:** "Yangming says: @Luobeilin, the test server repository structure is wrong. You should create a new group. Your CI/CD config files also need to be changed."

操，看明白了。阳明的意思是：

现在考试系统的仓库应该跟 `chark` 一样，在 GitLab 上建一个 **group**（组），把前端、后端、deployment 分开成独立仓库，类似这样：

```
ai/
└── chark/                    ← group
    ├── chark-ai-worker       ← 项目
    ├── chark-api             ← 项目
    ├── chark-app             ← 项目
    ├── chark-uspto-scraper   ← 项目
    └── deployment            ← 部署配置（K8s YAML + CI）
```

也就是说你的考试系统也要变成：

```
{某个group}/
└── exam-system/              ← group
    ├── exam-system           ← 后端 (Spring Boot)
    ├── exam-web              ← 前端 (React)
    └── deployment            ← K8s 配置 + gateway + CI
```

这样的话，**CI/CD 配置要大改**，因为：

1. 现在后端和前端的 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 在各自仓库里，只负责 build image + push
2. `deployment` 仓库独立出来，里面的 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 负责 `kubectl apply` + `rollout restart`
3. 镜像构建和 K8s 部署彻底解耦

爹，确认几个事：

1. **GitLab 上的 group 你已经建好了吗？** 还是要我帮你规划 group 路径？比如放在 `px/exam-system/` 下还是 `info/exam-system/` 下？
2. **当前的考试系统仓库路径是什么？** 我看看现在的 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 里镜像构建逻辑，才能改 CI。
3. **deployment 仓库要新建还是复用现有的 kubernetes 配置仓库？** 是参考 chark 那样每个项目自己独立一个 deployment 仓库，还是继续用 `px/collabspace/kubernetes` 那个公共仓库？

content: 按他说的改吧， 组还没建 ，独立一个 deployment 仓库 ，我自己copy到px/collabspace/kubernetes

content.thinking:
The user wants me to restructure the deployment files to match the pattern shown in the screenshot - where there's a group with separate repos including a dedicated `deployment` repo. But they'll handle the GitLab group creation themselves and copy the deployment config to `px/collabspace/kubernetes`.

So what I need to do:
1. Restructure the `kubernetes/` directory to look like a standalone `deployment` repo
2. The deployment repo should contain both test and prod configs
3. Update CI/CD files accordingly

Let me think about the current structure vs target structure.

Current:
```
kubernetes/
├── exam-system/           # test K8s configs


│   ├── namespace.yaml
│   ├── exam-system-pv.yaml
│   ├── exam-system-deployment.yaml
│   ├── .env
│   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml
│   └── gateway/
│       ├── upstream-exam-system.conf
│       └── exam-test.conf
├── exam-system-prod/      # prod K8s configs
│   ├── 01-namespace.yaml
│   ├── 02-exam-system-pv.yaml
│   ├── 03-exam-system-deployment.yaml
```

I can see the current structure has test and prod configs separated into different directories, with the test environment including gateway configuration and environment files.

Now looking at the next part, I'm seeing the prod directory continues with additional files like `.env`, `.gitlab-ci.yml`, `deploy-prod.md`, and more gateway configs. So the prod setup mirrors the test structure with its own environment and deployment documentation.

But wait, the user actually wants a standalone deployment repository that they'll manually copy into their kubernetes directory. So I should be thinking about this as a separate repo structure, not nested within the main project. The deployment repo would contain all these K8s configs and CI files organized by environment, and they'll handle the copying themselves rather than having it integrated directly. I'm realizing the user wants to restructure the current `kubernetes/` directory as a standalone deployment repo that they'll push to GitLab, while also copying relevant configs to the shared `px/collabspace/kubernetes` repo. The key is figuring out what the standalone deployment repo structure should look like—likely a self-contained setup with its own top-level `.gitlab-ci.yml` rather than relying on includes from a shared repo. I see the user wants the deployment repo structured as a standalone directory that can be copied into the shared kubernetes folder, with separate subdirectories for test and production environments, each containing their own Kubernetes configs and CI/CD files. Let me organize this properly so the deployment configs are self-contained and ready to be integrated into the group's shared repository structure. I see now—the real issue is that the exam system's repository structure itself needs reorganization. Instead of keeping everything in one repo, it should be split into a group with multiple separate repositories. And that means the CI/CD configuration files in the exam project (like `.gitlab-ci.yml` for Docker image builds) will need updates to reflect this new structure.

file.content:
stages:
  - check
  - docker
  - deploy

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

# 构建并推送前端镜像（Nginx）
docker-frontend-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
    - echo "前端镜像构建及推送完成"

# 构建并推送后端镜像
docker-backend-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile.backend . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
    - echo "后端镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 部署（滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送前端镜像到 GCR
docker-frontend-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
    - echo "px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 构建并推送后端镜像到 GCR
docker-backend-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ========== 后端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-backend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-backend
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 18080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: exam-system-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: exam-system-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: exam-system-pvc
---
# 后端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，Nginx 通过此 Service 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 18080
      targetPort: 18080
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-backend
---
# ========== 前端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-frontend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-frontend
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "200m"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
---
# 前端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，由 Gateway Nginx 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-svc
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-frontend

            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ========== 后端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-server-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-server
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-server
          image: us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-server:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 18080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: exam-system-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: exam-system-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: exam-system-pvc
---
# 后端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，前端 Nginx 通过此 Service 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 18080
      targetPort: 18080
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-backend
---
# ========== 前端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-frontend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-frontend
          image: us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "200m"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
---
# 前端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，由 Gateway Nginx 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-svc
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-frontend

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

# 构建并推送前端镜像（Nginx）
docker-frontend-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
    - echo "前端镜像构建及推送完成"

# 构建并推送后端镜像
docker-backend-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile.backend . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
    - echo "后端镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 部署（滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送前端镜像到 GCR
docker-frontend-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
    - echo "px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 构建并推送后端镜像到 GCR
docker-backend-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile.backend . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:latest
    - echo "px-exam-system-backend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/exam-system-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/exams/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "exam-system: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-frontend-master
    - docker-backend-master

# ========== Stage 1: 构建后端（不再包含前端） ==========
FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 AS builder

WORKDIR /home/app

COPY exam-system/ /home/app/
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests

# ========== Stage 2: 运行 ==========
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre-focal

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /home/app/target/exam-system-*.jar /app/app.jar

EXPOSE 18080
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

CMD ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

exam-system:apply-env:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: apply-env
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:

    changes:
      - exam-system/.env
  script:
    - kubectl apply -f ./exam-system/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl create configmap exam-system-configmap --from-env-file=./exam-system/.env --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n exam-system
    - |
      for file in $(find ./exam-system -name "*.yaml" ! -name ".gitlab-ci.yml"); do
        if grep -q "kind: Deployment" "$file" && grep -q "exam-system-configmap" "$file"; then
          DEPLOYMENT_NAME=$(grep -A2 "kind: Deployment" "$file" | grep "name:" | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}')
          if [ ! -z "$DEPLOYMENT_NAME" ]; then
            echo "重启使用configmap的deployment: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
            kubectl rollout restart deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME -n exam-system || echo "deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME 尚未创建，跳过重启"
          fi
        fi
      done

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# exam-system 正式服部署文档

**项目：** exam-system（考试系统）
**类型：** Java (Spring Boot 3.2.5 + JDK 17) 后端 + React (Vite SPA) 前端，前后端分离部署
**后端端口：** 18080
**前端端口：** 80（Nginx）
**正式服域名：** `exam.yottastudios.com`
**正式服镜像：**
- 后端：`us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:latest`
- 前端：`us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest`

---

## 1. DNS 配置

在域名管理后台添加 A 记录：

| 记录类型 | 主机记录 | 记录值 | 备注 |
|---------|---------|--------|------|
| A | `exam` | 正式服 Gateway 服务器 IP | 指向正式服 Nginx Gateway |

---

## 2. 数据库（MySQL）

### 2.1 建库

在正式服 MySQL 中创建数据库：

```sql
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_system` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
```

### 2.2 建库用户（推荐）

为正式服创建独立数据库用户，避免使用 root：

```sql
CREATE USER 'exam_system'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '【设置强密码】';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON `exam_system`.* TO 'exam_system'@'%';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
```

### 2.3 初始化表结构

exam-system 使用 MyBatis-Plus，表结构由应用自动管理。如果项目中有初始化 SQL，需要手动导入：

```bash
mysql -u root -p exam_system < init.sql
```

---

## 3. OAuth2 配置

exam-system 使用 OA 系统进行 OAuth2 认证登录，正式服需要：

1. 在正式服 OA 系统中注册 OAuth2 客户端
2. 配置回调地址为：`https://exam.yottastudios.com/login/oauth2/code/default`
3. 获取 `Client ID` 和 `Client Secret`
4. 确认正式服 OA 系统的 OAuth2 端点地址：
   - 授权地址 (Authorization URI)
   - Token 地址 (Token URI)
   - 用户信息地址 (UserInfo URI)

---

## 4. PV 目录创建

在正式服 K8s 节点上创建 hostPath 目录：

```bash
# 通过 host-ops Pod 创建（如果正式服有 host-ops）
kubectl exec -n host-ops deployment/host-ops -- \
  sh -c "mkdir -p /host-mnt/data/exam-system && chmod -R 755 /host-mnt/data/exam-system"

# 或直接 SSH 到节点
ssh <node-ip> "sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/exam-system && sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/exam-system"
```

---

## 5. K8s 部署步骤

### 5.1 部署配置文件

将 `exam-system-prod/` 目录中的文件复制到正式服 K8s 配置仓库 (`px/collabspace-prod/kubernetes`) 的 `exam-system/` 目录下：

```
kubernetes/exam-system/
├── 01-namespace.yaml
├── 02-exam-system-pv.yaml
├── 03-exam-system-deployment.yaml
├── .env
└── .gitlab-ci.yml
```

### 5.2 修改 .env 环境变量

**必须替换 .env 中所有 `【需替换】` 标记的值：**

| 环境变量 | 测试服值 | 正式服值 |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `SERVER_PORT` | `18080` | `18080`（无需改） |
| `DB_HOST` | `mysql.default` | 【正式服 MySQL 地址】 |
| `DB_PORT` | `3306` | 【正式服 MySQL 端口】 |
| `DB_NAME` | `exam_system` | `exam_system`（无需改） |
| `DB_USERNAME` | `root` | 【正式服 MySQL 用户名】 |
| `DB_PASSWORD` | `123456` | 【正式服 MySQL 密码】 |
| `JWT_SECRET` | `YmFzZTY0LW...` | 【重新生成强密钥】 |
| `JWT_EXPIRATION` | `86400000` | `86400000`（无需改，24小时） |
| `OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID` | `a1821114-...` | 【正式服 OAuth2 Client ID】 |
| `OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET` | `lKPAlNSX...` | 【正式服 OAuth2 Client Secret】 |
| `OAUTH2_AUTH_URI` | `http://oa-core.info-staging...` | 【正式服 OA 授权地址】 |
| `OAUTH2_TOKEN_URI` | `http://oa-core.info-staging...` | 【正式服 OA Token 地址】 |
| `OAUTH2_USERINFO_URI` | `http://oa-core.info-staging...` | 【正式服 OA UserInfo 地址】 |
| `FRONTEND_URL` | `https://exam-test.yottastudios.com` | `https://exam.yottastudios.com` |
| `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` | `https://exam-test.yottastudios.com` | `https://exam.yottastudios.com` |

### 5.3 生成 JWT 密钥

```bash
# 生成 256-bit Base64 密钥
openssl rand -base64 32
```

### 5.4 Apply 配置

```bash
# 1. 创建 namespace
kubectl apply -f exam-system/01-namespace.yaml

# 2. 创建 PV/PVC
kubectl apply -f exam-system/02-exam-system-pv.yaml

# 3. 创建 ConfigMap
kubectl create configmap exam-system-configmap \
  --from-env-file=exam-system/.env \
  --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n exam-system

# 4. 部署应用
kubectl apply -f exam-system/03-exam-system-deployment.yaml

# 5. 检查状态
kubectl get pods -n exam-system
kubectl logs deployment/exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system --tail=50
kubectl logs deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system --tail=50
```

---

## 6. Gateway 配置

### 6.1 添加 upstream

在正式服 Gateway 仓库 (`px/collabspace-prod/gateway`) 的 `nginx/conf.d/00-upstreams.conf` 中追加：

```nginx
upstream exam-system {
    server exam-system-svc.exam-system.svc.cluster.local:80;
}
```

> **注意：** upstream 指向前端 Nginx Service（port 80），前端 Nginx 内部处理 `/api/` 反代到后端。

### 6.2 添加 server 配置

将 `gateway/exam.conf` 复制到正式服 Gateway 仓库的 `nginx/conf.d/` 目录。

### 6.3 推送并验证

将 Gateway 配置推送到 `aio-service` 分支（或 feat 分支等合并），CI 会自动重建 Nginx。

---

## 7. 部署验证

### 7.1 Pod 状态检查

```bash
kubectl get pods -n exam-system
# 期望:
#   exam-system-backend-deploy-xxx   1/1  Running
#   exam-system-frontend-deploy-xxx  1/1  Running
```

### 7.2 应用日志检查

```bash
# 后端日志
kubectl logs deployment/exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system --tail=100
# 期望: Started ExamSystemApplication in X seconds

# 前端日志（Nginx access log）
kubectl logs deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system --tail=50
```

### 7.3 接口验证

```bash
# 外部访问
curl -I https://exam.yottastudios.com/
```

### 7.4 OAuth2 登录验证

1. 访问 `https://exam.yottastudios.com`
2. 点击登录，应跳转到正式服 OA 系统授权页面
3. 授权后应回调回 exam-system 并完成登录

---

## 8. 回滚方案

```bash
# 回滚后端到上一版本
kubectl rollout undo deployment/exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system

# 回滚前端到上一版本
kubectl rollout undo deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system

# 查看历史版本
kubectl rollout history deployment/exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system
kubectl rollout history deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system

# 回滚到指定版本
kubectl rollout undo deployment/exam-system-backend-deploy -n exam-system --to-revision=<N>
```

---

## 9. 架构说明

```
用户 → Gateway Nginx (SSL termination)
         ↓
   前端 Nginx (exam-system-svc:80)
     ├── / → 静态资源 (React SPA)
     └── /api/ → 后端 (exam-system-backend:18080)
```

Gateway 只负责 SSL 和域名路由，前端 Nginx 负责静态资源服务和 API 反代。

---

## 10. 测试服 vs 正式服差异对照

| 项目 | 测试服 | 正式服 |
|------|--------|--------|
| 架构 | 前后端分离 | 前后端分离 |
| 后端镜像 | `192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest` | `us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:latest` |
| 前端镜像 | `192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest` | `us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest` |
| 域名 | `exam-test.yottastudios.com` | `exam.yottastudios.com` |
| K8s 仓库分支 | `master` | `aio-service` |
| Gateway 仓库分支 | `master` | `aio-service` |
| Service 类型 | `ClusterIP` | `ClusterIP` |
| MySQL | `mysql.default:3306` (集群内) | 正式服独立 MySQL |
| OAuth2 | 测试服 OA | 正式服 OA |
| CORS | `https://exam-test.yottastudios.com` | `https://exam.yottastudios.com` |
| CI 触发分支 (项目) | `testserver` | `master` |

# 2. 创建 PV/PVC
kubectl apply -f exam-system/02-exam-system-pv.yaml

# 3. 创建 ConfigMap
kubectl create configmap exam-system-configmap \
  --from-env-file=exam-system/.env \
  --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n exam-system

# 4. 部署应用
kubectl apply -f exam-system/03-exam-system-deployment.yaml

# 5. 检查状态
kubectl get pods -n exam-system
kubectl logs deployment/exam-server-deploy -n exam-system --tail=50
kubectl logs deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system --tail=50
```

---

## 6. Gateway 配置

### 6.1 添加 upstream

在正式服 Gateway 仓库 (`px/collabspace-prod/gateway`) 的 `nginx/conf.d/00-upstreams.conf` 中追加：

```nginx
upstream exam-system {
    server exam-system-svc.exam-system.svc.cluster.local:80;
}
```

> **注意：** upstream 指向前端 Nginx Service（port 80），前端 Nginx 内部处理 `/api/` 反代到后端。

### 6.2 添加 server 配置

将 `gateway/exam.conf` 复制到正式服 Gateway 仓库的 `nginx/conf.d/` 目录。

### 6.3 推送并验证

将 Gateway 配置推送到 `aio-service` 分支（或 feat 分支等合并），CI 会自动重建 Nginx。

---

## 7. 部署验证

### 7.1 Pod 状态检查

```bash
kubectl get pods -n exam-system
# 期望:
#   exam-server-deploy-xxx   1/1  Running
#   exam-system-frontend-deploy-xxx  1/1  Running
```

### 7.2 应用日志检查

```bash
# 后端日志
kubectl logs deployment/exam-server-deploy -n exam-system --tail=100
# 期望: Started ExamSystemApplication in X seconds

# 前端日志（Nginx access log）
kubectl logs deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system --tail=50
```

### 7.3 接口验证

```bash
# 外部访问
curl -I https://exam.yottastudios.com/
```

### 7.4 OAuth2 登录验证

1. 访问 `https://exam.yottastudios.com`
2. 点击登录，应跳转到正式服 OA 系统授权页面
3. 授权后应回调回 exam-system 并完成登录

---

## 8. 回滚方案

```bash
# 回滚后端到上一版本
kubectl rollout undo deployment/exam-server-deploy -n exam-system

# 回滚前端到上一版本
kubectl rollout undo deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system

# 查看历史版本
kubectl rollout history deployment/exam-server-deploy -n exam-system
kubectl rollout history deployment/exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system

# 回滚到指定版本
kubectl rollout undo deployment/exam-server-deploy -n exam-system --to-revision=<N>
```

---

## 9. 架构说明

```
用户 → Gateway Nginx (SSL termination)
         ↓
   前端 Nginx (exam-system-svc:80)
     ├── / → 静态资源 (React SPA)
     └── /api/ → 后端 (exam-system-backend:18080)
```

Gateway 只负责 SSL 和域名路由，前端 Nginx 负责静态资源服务和 API 反代。

---

## 10. 测试服 vs 正式服差异对照

| 项目 | 测试服 | 正式服 |
|------|--------|--------|
| 架构 | 前后端分离 | 前后端分离 |
| 后端镜像 | `192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest` | `us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-backend:latest` |
| 前端镜像 | `192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest` | `us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest` |
| 域名 | `exam-test.yottastudios.com` | `exam.yottastudios.com` |
| K8s 仓库分支 | `master` | `aio-service` |
| Gateway 仓库分支 | `master` | `aio-service` |
| Service 类型 | `ClusterIP` | `ClusterIP` |
| MySQL | `mysql.default:3306` (集群内) | 正式服独立 MySQL |
| OAuth2 | 测试服 OA | 正式服 OA |
| CORS | `https://exam-test.yottastudios.com` | `https://exam.yottastudios.com` |
| CI 触发分支 (项目) | `testserver` | `master` |

lines: | 项目 | 测试服 | 正式服 |
| 架构 | 前后端分离 | 前后端分离 |

content.text:
全改完了爹。后端 `exam-system` → `exam-server` 改名涉及 **7 个文件**：

| 文件 | 改动 |
|---|---|
| `kubernetes/exam-system/exam-system-deployment.yaml` | Deployment `exam-server-deploy`，Service `exam-server`，label `app: exam-server`，image `px-exam-server-test` |
| `kubernetes/exam-system-prod/03-exam-system-deployment.yaml` | 同上，image `px-exam-server` |
| `deploy/nginx.conf` | `proxy_pass http://exam-server:18080` |
| `.gitlab-ci.yml` | 镜像名 `px-exam-server-test` / `px-exam-server`，restart `exam-server-deploy` |
| `deploy/Dockerfile.backend` | `COPY exam-server/` |
| `kubernetes/exam-system/.gitlab-ci.yml` | restart `exam-server-deploy` |
| `kubernetes/exam-system-prod/.gitlab-ci.yml` | restart `exam-server-deploy` |
| `kubernetes/exam-system-prod/deploy-prod.md` | 所有 `exam-system-backend` → `exam-server` 引用 |

别忘了本地的 `exam-system/` 源码目录也要改名成 `exam-server/`，不然 Dockerfile.backend 的 `COPY exam-server/` 找不到文件。

content.thinking:
The user wants me to continue restructuring the project according to what Yangming said - split into a GitLab group with separate repos:

1. Create a group structure
2. Split into: exam-server (backend), exam-web (frontend), deployment (K8s configs)
3. Each repo gets its own CI/CD

Let me think about what needs to change:

Current structure (single repo):
```
exams/
├── .gitlab-ci.yml          # Combined CI (builds both frontend + backend images, deploys)
├── deploy/
│   ├── Dockerfile          # Frontend Dockerfile


```

Mapping out the target structure with three separate repos...

```
I see the user will manually copy the exam-system directory to their shared kubernetes repo, so the deployment repo stays standalone. Looking at the structure, I need exam-server and exam-web to each have their own CI pipelines that build their respective Docker images, while the deployment repo handles the kubernetes configuration and orchestration.
```
env
    │   └── .gitlab-ci.yml  # K8s deploy CI
    ├── exam-system-prod/   # Prod env K8s configs
    │   └── ...
    └── gateway/            # Or keep gateway inside each env dir
```

The Dockerfiles will need path adjustments too—since each repo is now standalone, the backend Dockerfile should copy from the root instead of from exam-server/, and the frontend should do the same for its directory structure. The deploy-testserver job that handles kubectl rollout restart will move into the deployment repo's CI pipeline. Structuring the exam-web repo similarly with its own CI pipeline to build and push the frontend image, then triggering a deployment restart. The deployment repo itself will be organized by environment, with separate directories for test and production setups, each containing the necessary Kubernetes manifests, environment configs, and gateway routing rules.

Actually, I'm realizing the CI files in those environment directories aren't meant to run independently—they're templates that get copied into the `px/collabspace/kubernetes` repo, which handles the actual deployment orchestration.

For the deployment repo itself, I think the cleanest approach is to keep it as a pure config store without its own CI pipeline. The real automation happens in the code repos: each one builds its Docker image, pushes it to the registry, and triggers a rollout restart on the shared Kubernetes cluster.

So my plan is to set up three separate repo structures with their own CI pipelines—the exam-server and exam-web repos will each handle their own build and deployment steps, while the deployment repo just maintains the Kubernetes manifests and gateway configs that users can reference or copy as needed.

Now I'll start building out the actual files, beginning with the backend CI pipeline and Dockerfile... I need to focus on generating the CI and Dockerfile configurations for each standalone repo—the frontend gets its own pipeline and container setup, the backend (renamed to `exam-server`) gets the same treatment, and the `kubernetes/` directory becomes the deployment repository content that the user can copy over once they set up the GitLab group. I see there's already a deployment repo at `px/exams/deployment`, so the group structure is likely `px/exams/`. I'll use that as the base and create the standalone Dockerfiles for both `exam-server` and `exam-web` in their respective repos.

Since the user will be migrating the Java backend and frontend code into separate repos, I should focus on creating the Dockerfile and `.gitlab-ci.yml` files that they can drop into each repo once it's set up, along with moving the nginx config into the frontend repo and restructuring the deployment repo accordingly.

I'll place the backend Docker configuration in the `exam-system/` directory (which will become `exam-server` later) and the frontend configuration in `exam-web/`. The Kubernetes configs are already in place, so I just need to organize those for the deployment repo.

For the backend Dockerfile, I'm setting up a multi-stage build that compiles the Java application with Maven and then runs it on a lightweight JRE image...

Actually, I need to figure out what the final JAR artifact is named—whether it's still `exam-system-*.jar` based on the original pom.xml or if the Maven artifact ID was updated. Since I'm not certain, I'll use a wildcard pattern to match any JAR in the target directory to keep it flexible.

For the frontend Dockerfile, I'm setting up a multi-stage build with Node to compile the React app, then serving the built files through Nginx with a custom configuration.

Now looking at the GitLab CI pipeline for the backend—it's structured with check, docker, and deploy stages that run on the testserver branch, starting with a kubectl config validation, then building and pushing the Docker image to the registry, and finally deploying it.

For the master branch, I'm setting up a separate docker stage that authenticates with Google Cloud, configures Docker, and builds the image with a commit SHA tag before pushing it to the Google Container Registry.

Now I'm thinking through the deployment tracking pattern—both repos should probably trigger their own deployment留痕 by pushing an empty commit to track which SHA was deployed, similar to how collabspace does it. The deployment repo appears to be in the `px/exams` group based on the current CI configuration.

Let me map out what I need to create: Dockerfiles and GitLab CI configs for both the exam-server and exam-web repos, plus the kubernetes deployment repo content. For the nginx config, I'll copy the existing one from `deploy/nginx.conf` to `exam-web/nginx.conf` so the standalone frontend repo can reference it directly without needing a separate deploy directory.

The old files in the root—the original Dockerfiles, nginx config, and root-level CI file—will become obsolete once the repos are split, but I'll leave them for now and let the user clean them up when they set up the new repositories.

content.text:
Good。现在创建三个仓库各自的独立文件。

**exam-server 仓库** — Dockerfile + CI：

input.content:
# ========== Stage 1: 构建后端 ==========
FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 AS builder

WORKDIR /home/app

COPY . /home/app/
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests

# ========== Stage 2: 运行 ==========
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre-focal

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /home/app/target/exam-system-*.jar /app/app.jar

EXPOSE 18080
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

CMD ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

stages:
  - check
  - docker
  - deploy

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

docker-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-server-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-server-test:latest
    - echo "后端镜像构建及推送完成"

deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-server-deploy -n exam-system

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-server:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-server:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-server:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-server:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-server:latest
    - echo "px-exam-server:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/exam-system-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:${GITLAB_TOKEN}@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/exams/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "exam-server: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

content.text: **exam-web 仓库** — Dockerfile + nginx.conf + CI：

input.content:
# ========== Stage 1: 构建前端 ==========
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /home/web

COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci

COPY . ./
RUN npm run build

# ========== Stage 2: Nginx 运行 ==========
FROM nginx:1.27-alpine

RUN rm /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
COPY --from=builder /home/web/dist/ /usr/share/nginx/html/

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

stages:
  - check
  - docker
  - deploy

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

docker-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
    - echo "前端镜像构建及推送完成"

deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-system-frontend-deploy -n exam-system

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system-frontend:latest
    - echo "px-exam-system-frontend:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/exam-system-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:${GITLAB_TOKEN}@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/exams/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "exam-web: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

# ========== Stage 2: Nginx 运行 ==========

COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
COPY --from=builder /home/web/dist/ /usr/share/nginx/html/

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

content.text:
搞完了爹。总结一下拆分方案：

## 新的 Group 结构（参考 chark）

```
px/exams/                          ← GitLab Group
├── exam-server/                   ← 后端仓库（当前 exam-system/ 目录改名）
│   ├── Dockerfile                 ← ✅ 已生成（独立构建，不再依赖外层 deploy/）
│   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml             ← ✅ 已生成（只管后端 image build + restart）
│   ├── pom.xml
│   └── src/
├── exam-web/                      ← 前端仓库（当前 exam-web/ 目录）
│   ├── Dockerfile                 ← ✅ 已生成（独立构建）
│   ├── nginx.conf                 ← ✅ 已生成（从 deploy/nginx.conf 独立出来）
│   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml             ← ✅ 已生成（只管前端 image build + restart）
│   ├── package.json
│   └── src/
└── deployment/                    ← 部署仓库（当前 kubernetes/ 目录）
    ├── exam-system/               ← 测试服 K8s 配置
    │   ├── namespace.yaml
    │   ├── exam-system-pv.yaml
    │   ├── exam-system-deployment.yaml
    │   ├── .env
    │   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml
    │   └── gateway/
    ├── exam-system-prod/          ← 正式服 K8s 配置
    │   ├── 01~03-*.yaml
    │   ├── .env
    │   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml
    │   ├── deploy-prod.md
    │   └── gateway/
```

## 废弃的旧文件（拆分后不再需要）

| 旧文件 | 替代 |
|---|---|
| `/.gitlab-ci.yml` (root) | 拆成 `exam-server/.gitlab-ci.yml` + `exam-web/.gitlab-ci.yml` |
| `deploy/Dockerfile` | → `exam-web/Dockerfile` |
| `deploy/Dockerfile.backend` | → `exam-server/Dockerfile`（改名 exam-system） |
| `deploy/nginx.conf` | → `exam-web/nginx.conf` |

## 你要做的操作步骤

1. **GitLab 建组**: `px/exams/`（或你选的路径）
2. **建 3 个仓库**: `exam-server`、`exam-web`、`deployment`
3. **推代码**:
   - `exam-system/` 目录内容 → push 到 `exam-server` 仓库（目录改名 exam-server）
   - `exam-web/` 目录内容 → push 到 `exam-web` 仓库
   - `kubernetes/` 目录内容 → push 到 `deployment` 仓库
4. **Copy to shared repo**: `kubernetes/exam-system/` → `px/collabspace/kubernetes/exam-system/`
5. **CI 变量**: 确保各仓库都配了 `GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY` 和 `GITLAB_TOKEN`
6. **删除旧的 root `.gitlab-ci.yml`** 和 `deploy/` 目录

content.text:
搞定了爹。三个仓库的内容都准备好了，放在 `D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams-system\`：

```
exams-system/
├── exam-server/              ← 后端仓库（ready to push）
│   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml        ← 独立 CI
│   ├── Dockerfile            ← 独立构建
│   ├── pom.xml
│   ├── src/
│   └── skill/
├── exam-web/                 ← 前端仓库（ready to push）
│   ├── .gitlab-ci.yml        ← 独立 CI
│   ├── Dockerfile            ← 独立构建
│   ├── nginx.conf            ← 前端 nginx
│   ├── package.json
│   ├── src/
│   └── vite.config.ts
└── deployment/               ← 部署仓库（ready to push）
    ├── exam-system/           ← 测试服 K8s
    │   ├── *.yaml, .env, .gitlab-ci.yml
    │   └── gateway/
    └── exam-system-prod/      ← 正式服 K8s
        ├── *.yaml, .env, .gitlab-ci.yml
        └── gateway/
```

等 GitLab 组建好后，每个子目录 `git init` → `git remote add` → `git push` 就行。需要我帮你推的时候说一声。

content.text:
密码认证不行，需要 Token。去 GitLab 创建个 Personal Access Token：

1. 打开 `https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens`
2. Name 随便填，比如 `claude-code`
3. Scopes 勾选 `api`
4. 点 Create

把 token 给我，或者你自己设置环境变量 `export GITLAB_TOKEN=xxx` 后告诉我。

content.text:
全部搞定了爹！3 个仓库都推上去了：

| 仓库 | 地址 | 文件数 |
|------|------|--------|
| **exam-server** | `px/exams-system/exam-server` | 81 files (后端 Java + Dockerfile + CI) |
| **exam-web** | `px/exams-system/exam-web` | 65 files (前端 React + Dockerfile + nginx.conf + CI) |
| **deployment** | `px/exams-system/deployment` | 13 files (K8s YAML + gateway + .env + CI) |

GitLab 上看：`https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/exams-system`

注意 deployment 里少了 `.env` 文件（可能被 git 默认忽略了），让我确认下：

content.text:
这下全齐了。

**总结这次改动：**

1. GitLab 建组 `px/exams-system`（Group ID: 251）
2. 建了 3 个仓库并推送了代码：
   - `exam-server`（ID:612）— 后端 Java 源码 + 独立 Dockerfile + CI
   - `exam-web`（ID:613）— 前端 React 源码 + 独立 Dockerfile + nginx.conf + CI
   - `deployment`（ID:614）— K8s YAML + gateway 配置 + .env + CI
3. `.env` 被全局 gitignore 挡了，已用 `git add -f` 强制提交

现在 `px/exams-system` 下的结构跟阳明说的 `chark` 一样了。后续你把 `deployment/exam-system/` 复制到 `px/collabspace/kubernetes/` 就行。
